snippet.title: Yeh Awarapan | Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani | Vishesh Bhatt | Amaal, Arijit, Rashmi Virag| Awarapan 2
snippet.description:
Saath de raha, hai bas mera….
Yeh Awarapan 🕊️
 
Combining Amaal Mallik’s composition, Rashmi Virag’s lyrics and the arresting voice of Arijit Singh, ‘Yeh Awarapan’ is the second song release from the highly awaited ‘Awarapan 2’. Featuring Emraan Hashmi in the video, the song combines his past and present to show how his constant companion is only his Awarapan ❤️‍🩹
 
#YehAwarapan #ArijitSingh #EmraanHashmi #AmaalMallik #DishaPatani #Awarapan2 
 
Song - Yeh Awarapan
Music - Amaal Mallik
Singers - Arijit Singh
Lyrics - Rashmi Virag
 
Music Team -
Music Produced & Arranged by - Vaibhav Pani & BLUK
Additional Music Production - Rakesh Venkatapuram & Amaal Mallik.
Song Mixed & Mastered by - Pukhraj Sonkar.
Pianos - Vatan Dhuriya.
Electric Guitars - Kalyan Baruah, Ishan Das & Vaibhav Pani.
Acoustic Guitar - Ishan Das
Bass - Saurabh Suman
Drums - Gino Banks
Ishan’s Guitars recorded by -Nishant Pritam Das (Euphony Studios)
Drums & Bass recorded by Abhishek Khandelwal (YRF Studios), Assisted By - Dileep Nair.
Music Assistants: Mohak Chhabria, Luvdeep Saini, Gaurav Sanghvi, Anvay Patil, Rujul Deolikar.
Amaal Mallik Management: Mourjo Chatterjee.
Music Head Vishesh Films: Rohit Saini
 
Starring Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani, Shabana Azmi, Suvinder Vicky, Vijayant Kohli, Aniruddh Rawal, Atul Kumar

A Vishesh Bhatt Production

Directed By Nitin Kakkar

Editor Devendra Murdeshwar
Production Designer Teena Paradkar
Choreographer Mudassar Khan
 
Theatrical Distribution Pen Marudhar
In Cinemas 14th August 2026

Juda ho gaya hai
 
Na koi pyaas hai
Meri inn aaknhon main
Na koi manzil hai
Meri in rahon main
Saath de raha hai bas mera

snippet.title: Madhosh | Toxic (Hindi) | Rocking Star Yash, Tara Sutaria | Tanishk, Arslan, Faheem, Siddharth, Syed
snippet.description:
Love begins where reason ends... ❤️✨
Yash & Tara bring the magic alive in #Madhosh.

🎵 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁𝘀
Song: Madhosh
Movie: Toxic
Music: Tanishk Bagchi, Arslan Nizami & Faheem Abdullah
Singer: Siddharth Basrur
Lyricist: Arslan Nizami & Syed Murad Gilani
Music Produced And Arranged by: Tanishk Bagchi
Additional Production: Krishna Kishor & Param Raj
Additional Live Production: Krishna Kishor 
Strings: Budapest Orchestra
Chorus: Chennai Grouping Singing Team
Choir: Elfe Choir
Keys: Rajesh, Navneeth, Melvin 
Session Eng: Lijesh Kumar & Mani Ratnam
Mix & Master: Eric Pillai @Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant Mix Engineer: Michael Edwin Pillai

🎬 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁 & 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝘄
Starring: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria & Rukmini Vasanth
Written by: Yash & Geetu Mohandas
Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions & Monster Mind Creations

To Stream & Download Full Song: 
Spotify - https://bit.ly/45jcg5C
JioSaavn - https://bit.ly/4w9ozNO
Gaana - https://bit.ly/4yoy79c
iTunes - https://apple.co/4vHGFp9
Apple Music - https://apple.co/4vHGFp9
Amazon Prime Music - https://amzn.to/4aZLkLQ
YouTube Music - https://bit.ly/4yEryj9

Lyrics:
Main Saaki Kinaaron Ka 
Bhatka Hoon In Nigaahon Par 
Na Pucho Yun Khaar Hoon
Aur Duniya Se Yun Zaar Zaar Hoon 

Ishq Hain Kya 
Haa Mujhko Bata 
Teri Nazron Se Nazrein Mili  
Kya Badalne Laga Yeh Kaisa Samaa
Haan Andar Hi Andar Se Dil Keh Raha

Madhosh Main 
Na Hosh Mein 
Aur Dil Pada Kisi Soch Mein 

Haan.. Tere Paas Mein 
Tere Saath Se 
Lagta Hain Kuch Khaas Yeh 

(Haan Madhosh Main 
Na Hosh Mein 
Aur Dil Pada Kisi Soch Mein..) ..2 

(Main Aandhi Toofaano Sa 
Seena Chattano Sa 
Jalta Hoon Main Aag Sa) ..2 

Nigaahon Sa Tu 
Junoon Bann Raha 
Mere Dil Pe Tera Yeh Zakhm Laga 
Yeh Kaisi Khalish Rahi Darmiyaan 
Ke Andar Hi Andar Sulagta Raha 

Madhosh Main 
Na Hosh Mein 
Aur Dil Pada Kisi Soch Mein 

Haan.. Tere Paas Mein 
Tere Saath Se 
Lagta Hain Kuch Khaas Yeh 

(Haan.. Madhosh Main 
Na Hosh Mein 
Aur Dil Pada Kisi Soch Mein) ..2 

Chorus…

snippet.title: Other Mommy | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Your mommy won’t save you. Other Mommy only in theaters October 9.

Can I go inside your heart?

From James Wan, one of the most influential architects of modern horror behind the Saw, Insidious and The Conjuring franchises—and Rob Savage, the director of bold genre films Host and The Boogeyman, comes a terrifying trip into the darkening world of a young girl, Bela, who forms a relationship with a sinister entity in her home who looks uncannily like her own mother.

Academy Award® winner Jessica Chastain (It Chapter Two, The Eyes of Tammy Faye) stars in a dual role as Bela’s mother and as “Other Mommy,” a manifestation of the entity. Jay Duplass (Transparent, Industry) plays Daddo, Bela’s father, and Arabella Olivia Clark (The Housemaid, The Hand that Rocks the Cradle) plays Bela. 

The impressive supporting cast includes Actor Award nominee Dichen Lachman (Severance), Emmy and Tony Award nominee Arian Moayed (Succession) and screen legend Karen Allen (Indiana Jones films).  

From Blumhouse Atomic Monster, Other Mommy is directed by Rob Savage from a screenplay by WGA award winner Nathan Elston, writer for the Emmy-winning sensation Succession, based on the New York Times bestselling novel Incidents Around the House by Josh Malerman (Bird Box).

The film is produced by James Wan, p.g.a., and is executive produced by Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Rob Savage, Josh Malerman and Ryan Lewis.

snippet.title: Clayface | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Meet the new face of Gotham. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters October 23.

DC Studios’ “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the cult favorite villain from Gotham’s rogues gallery.

Matt Hagen’s meteoric rise from Gotham street kid to Hollywood leading man is tragically cut short when a local crime boss’s actions leave him horribly disfigured. Abandoned by his team and with nothing left, Matt seeks out a cutting edge treatment that miraculously returns him to his former self… but also unexpectedly affects his grip on reality, spiraling him down a destructive path of all-consuming revenge.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James.

James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Chantal Nong Vo, Lars P. Winther, Rafi Crohn and Paul Ritchie executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris and costume designer Keith Madden. Music is by Volker Bertelmann.

DC Studios Presents a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

snippet.title: Cute Balma - Official Video | Armaan Malik | Ruchika Jangid | Chirayu, Zaid Ayaan Tuba
snippet.description:
Number 1 Records & Armaan Malik Presents new song Cute Balma

DISCLAIMER:

यह वीडियो एवं इसमें प्रस्तुत सभी पात्र और घटनाएँ केवल मनोरंजन (Entertainment Purpose) के उद्देश्य से बनाई गई हैं। वीडियो में बच्चों सहित सभी पात्रों का उपयोग केवल कहानी और रचनात्मक प्रस्तुति के संदर्भ में किया गया है।

इस वीडियो का उद्देश्य किसी भी धर्म, जाति, समुदाय, व्यक्ति या धार्मिक भावनाओं को ठेस पहुँचाना नहीं है। यदि किसी दृश्य, संवाद या प्रस्तुति से किसी की भावनाएँ आहत होती हैं, तो यह पूर्णतः अनजाने में है और हमारा उद्देश्य किसी का अपमान करना नहीं है।

यह वीडियो केवल मनोरंजन के लिए है। कृपया इसे मनोरंजन के रूप में ही देखें।


Singer : Armaan Malik & Ruchika Jangid
Director : Amaan Malik, Farista
Staring : Armaan Malik, Payal Malik, Kritika Malik, Chirayu, Navya, Zaid, Ayaan, Tuba 
Lyrics : Ujjwal Chauhan
Dance Choreography : Farista
Edit : Team Armaan Malik 
Di : Arsh Bhullar
Music: Vikash Haryanvi
Producer : Armaan Malik

snippet.title: Farak - Taare | Official Music Video |
snippet.description:
“There are evenings when the whole world seems misaligned.
To be loved then is a miracle.” - Franz Kafka

"Taare" is a part of Diwaar Ke Uss Paar, the second half of a story that began with Diwaar Ke Is Paar. Thank you for listening.

Listen on Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/2iVj11OdEBNIGUv9f7jGPK?si=inzh6JX8SxuCWRGbq-gx0A


Lyrics -

Humara thokaron se kuch purana khaas naata hai
Hai jisne ishq hi dekha na vo rab ka dulara hai

Humara thokaron se kuch purana khaas naata hai
Hai jisne ishq hi dekha na vo rab ka dulara hai

Ab Haal-e-dil to na poocho 
batate dar sa lagta hai
Is khaali ghar ko na looto
ye buzdil sar patakta hai

Vo ghar chhoota hai jab se Kambhakhat koi aasra na hai
Ye kaagaz kaanpta jab hote dil ke ghaav taaza hain

Ke lafz kuch aise hain
Gawaya is qadar ke
Gaur farmaiyega
Gawaya is qadar ke
Paane ko ab kuch bacha na hai
Parinda kaid pinjre mein
Parinda kaid pinjre mein
Use dar aasmaan ka hai


Gawaya is qadar ke paane ko ab kuch bacha na hai
parinda kaid pinjre mein use dar aasmaan ka hai

Jo bikhra toot ke fir vo
Samete na simat ta hai
Hain partein is qadar dil pe
Taraashe na nikharta hai

Halaaton se liya jab bair to har, daav haara main
Asal mein jeena mushkil Maut ka bas naam zyada hai
Ye kandhe jhuk rahe hai ummeedon ka bhaar zyaada hai

Andhere mein pala jo dar use bas roshni ka hai
Asal mein jeena mushkil maut ka bas naam zyada hai
